items.title: Solstice Advance Materials and Qnity Electronics Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P SmallCap 600
items.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices will make the following changes to the S&P 500, S&P SmallCap 600:

items.title: CarMax to leave the S&P 500 to give way to this famous industrial company’s spinoff
items.description: A place in the S 500 is a sought-after spot for companies, as it exposes their stock to a broad swath of active investors and to countless passive funds that track the benchmark automatically.

items.title: The S&P 500 Adds 2 Spinoffs to the Index. Here’s Who Is Leaving.
items.description: Honeywell and DuPont are hiving off companies in the coming days, and both are going into the S&P 500.

items.title:
•Solstice Advance Materials Will Replace CarMax In The S&P 500, And CarMax Will Replace USANA Health Sciences In The S&P
SmallCap 600 Effective Prior To The Opening Of Trading On Friday, October 31
Barclays Raises Honeywell (HON) PT After Q3 Earnings
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the 10 Best Dow Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On October 24, Barclays increased its price target for Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) from $265 to $270 while maintaining an Overweight rating. This decision came after the company reported Q3 results. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) recorded […]
